question: Will the Narrows be hikeable on 2026/05/29?
reason: Recent data shows Virgin River flow at 51.5 cfs on May 7, 2026, well below 150 cfs threshold.
evidence: Virgin River flow at 51.5 cfs on May 7, 2026, well below 150 cfs threshold.
Zion National Park anticipates high visitation and potential trail congestion during Memorial Day weekend.
No significant rainfall or snowmelt events reported in the area leading up to May 29, 2026.
